Platform: Best engagement windows: 9:00–10:00 AM EST (educational content) and 2:00–3:00 PM EST (CTAs). Avoid posting before 8:00 AM or after 9:00 PM EST.
Best engagement windows: 11:00 AM–1:00 PM EST and 6:00–8:00 PM EST. Upload natively — do not use Buffer for TikTok video upload if video quality degrades.
Best engagement windows: 8:00–11:00 PM EST (evergreen and educational pins). Product pins perform consistently across all times — optimize for batch scheduling.

Core pack (use on every post): #seedwarden #growyourown #heirloomseeds. Rotating topical pack: match to content type. Maximum 10 hashtags on Instagram. TikTok: 5–7 hashtags. Pinterest: include hashtags in description body — not as trailing tags.
Educational: 40% of posts. Product/CTA: 22%. Social Proof: 12%. Behind the Scenes: 10%. Lifestyle/Seasonal: 16%. Maintain this ratio — heavy product posting suppresses organic reach on IG and TikTok.
Instagram carousel: 1080x1080px per slide. 3–8 slides. First slide must function as a standalone post — assume most viewers only see slide 1.
TikTok: 9:16 vertical, 1080x1920px. 30–60 seconds optimal. Use text overlay for first 3 seconds to retain viewers past the first swipe.

Pinterest standard pin: 1000x1500px (2:3 ratio). Carousel pin: same dimensions per slide. Add text overlay to every pin — Pinterest is a visual search engine; context must be visible without clicking.
